title: AN ACT CHANGING THE NAME OF THE ARGAO INTERMEDIATE SCHOOL IN THE MUNICIPALITY OF ARGAO, PROVINCE OF CEBU, TO ANTONIO MIÃOZA INTERMEDIATE SCHOOL.

chunks.text:
H. No. 3280 / 57 OG No. 7, 1197 (February 13, 1961)

[ REPUBLIC ACT NO. 2807, June 19, 1960 ]

AN ACT CHANGING THE NAME OF THE ARGAO INTERMEDIATE SCHOOL IN THE MUNICIPALITY OF ARGAO, PROVINCE OF CEBU, TO ANTONIO MIÃOZA INTERMEDIATE SCHOOL.

Be it enacted by the Senate and House of Representatives of the Philippines in Congress assembled:

SECTION 1. The name of the Argao Intermediate School in the Municipality of Argao, Province of Cebu, is hereby changed to Antonio Miñoza Intermediate School.

SEC. 2. This Act shall take effect upon its approval.

Enacted without Executive approval, June 19, 1960.
